description: The LightTool component can be best learned through its page, the Light Tool for non power users.

fields.Color: The color to make new lights.
fields.Intensity: The intensity to make new lights.
fields.ShadowType: The shadow type to make new lights.
fields.ShadowStrength: The strength for the shadows new lights should have.
fields.SpotAngle: The spot angle of new lights.
fields.PointLightVisual: The current point light visual root.
fields.SpotlightVisual: The current spot light visual root.
fields.DirectionalLightVisual: The current directional light visual root.
fields.ColorIndicators: A list of color fields to drive with the indication color.
fields.ShowGizmo: Whether to show the Gizmo of new lights.
fields._colorPicker: The current color picker being used to pick the color for ``Color``.

methods.OnChangeColor: Handles when the user clicks the menu option to change the created light color.
